endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.StorageSync/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Storage Sync Rest API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.StorageSync/storageSyncServices
